title: stellularia abortiva
intro: Stellularia abortiva, also known as Blue Mountain tea or Chinese chinchin, is a plant native to the high mountains of China and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce menstruation and stimulate the uterus, which makes it a popular remedy for menstrual disorders and infertility. The health benefits of Stellularia abortiva include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Stellularia abortiva are typically made from the dried leaves and flowers, which can be steeped in hot water to make a tea or used in combination with other herbs for a range of health benefits.
